description: Netflix Inc is the world's largest subscription streaming service with over 300 million subscribers. It produces and licenses film and television content globally.
known_facts: Netflix has over 300 million paid subscribers globally
Greg Peters is Netflix's co-CEO alongside Ted Sarandos since 2023
Netflix launched an ad-supported tier in 2022 which is growing rapidly
Netflix produced Oscar-winning content including Roma and The Power of the Dog
Netflix cracked down on password sharing in 2023 driving subscriber growth
Original content spending exceeds $17 billion annually
Netflix games division offers mobile gaming included with subscription
known_risks: Intense competition from Disney+, HBO Max, Apple TV+, Amazon Prime Video, and Peacock
Content costs inflation reducing free cash flow
Subscriber growth saturation in mature US and European markets
Content localization challenges in international markets
Loss of licensed content as studios launch competing platforms
Password sharing crackdown may have exhausted its subscriber boost
known_strengths: First-mover advantage and largest content library in streaming
Ad-supported tier opens new high-margin revenue stream
International growth especially in Asia-Pacific and Latin America
Data-driven content investment and recommendation algorithm
Live events strategy including sports rights as new growth driver
